title: Resume Keyword Checker — ATS Optimization for Designers
description: Free interactive ATS resume keyword checker for designers. Compare your resume against job descriptions, optimize for Applicant Tracking Systems.

schemas.name: Designer ATS Resume Keyword Checker
schemas.description: An interactive tool for graphic designers and UI/UX professionals to check their resumes against job descriptions for ATS (Applicant Tracking System) optimization, featuring Montreal-specific market data.
